channel.title: Advanced-Security on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Advanced-Security on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: GitHub Code Quality enterprise policy
item.description:
GitHub Advanced Security enterprise policies now allow configuring GitHub Code Quality availability independently from Code Security.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Secret scanning validity checks available for Proxima, new validators added
item.description:
GitHub announced that secret scanning validity checks are now available on GitHub Proxima and Enterprise Server Proxima. The feature is offered to customers using GitHub Secret Protection and GitHub Advanced Security, and several new validators have been added.

  • Source: GitHub
